mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_ban(user_id, enforcer_id, reason, custom_reason, start_time, end_time, create_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{enforcerId}, #{reason}, #{customReason}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_ban WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND end_time > NOW() ORDER BY end_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_ban SET end_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND end_time > NOW()
UPDATE user_ban SET end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
